name: maui-ai-debugging
description: End-to-end workflow for building, deploying, inspecting, and debugging .NET MAUI and MAUI Blazor Hybrid apps as an AI agent. Use when: (1) Building or running a MAUI app on iOS simulator, Android emulator, Mac Catalyst, or Linux/GTK, (2) Inspecting or interacting with a running app's UI (visual tree, tapping, filling text, screenshots, property queries), (3) Debugging Blazor WebView content via CDP, (4) Managing simulators or emulators, (5) Setting up MauiDevFlow in a MAUI project, (6) Comple...
